response: Replace [sweet treats] with fresh fruits and [sugary drinks] with water or herbal tea. Check food labels for hidden sugars. Use natural sweeteners like honey or maple syrup in moderation. Avoid processed snacks high in added sugars. Read nutrition facts carefully before purchasing. Gradually reduce sugar intake to avoid cravings. Choose whole, unprocessed foods whenever possible. Replace [sugar-laden snacks] with healthy alternatives like nuts or yogurt.
